There is some differences in the optimizations and code path used for the MI30X and MI35X GPUs. The accuracy is fine when running on MI300X GPUs. However, there is c

sglang.title: fix(nixl): close file descriptors after each FILE transfer
sglang.author: lluki
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
NixlFileManager.files_to_nixl_tuples() opened one os.open() file descriptor per key on every batch_set_v1 / batch_get_v1 call and never closed them on the success path.
Note: The first commit fixes the NIXL backend testsuite only. Second commit fixes the close and adds a regression test.

sglang.title: docs: prepend SGLANG_JIT_DEEPGEMM_PRECOMPILE=0 for H200 FP8 Flash max-throughput
sglang.author: zijiexia
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

In the DeepSeek-V4 cookbook deployment command generator, prepend SGLANG_JIT_DEEPGEMM_PRECOMPILE=0 to the env block for the H200 FP8 + Flash (small) + Max-Throughput recipe so the generated sglang serve command skips the DeepGEMM JIT precompile out of the box.
Scope is intentionally narrow:

Image generation requests sometimes need to control text tokenizer sequence length (e.g. via Diffusers-style kwargs or API extensions). Previously, diffusers_kwargs was dropped when building SamplingParams, and several pipelines hard-coded max_length for chat-template / tokenizer calls, s

sglang.title: [AMD] Enable preshuffle paged MQA and page_size=64 for NSA indexer
sglang.author: 1am9trash
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Depends on aiter PR#2879 — must be merged first.

Motivation

In the NSA indexer, paged mqa computation is very slow at high concurrency. For example, at 8k1kcc64, it takes ~88 us per layer, consisting of two kernels (logits tensor init 11us + MQA kernel 77us).

The main bottleneck is the oversized

sglang.title: [AMD] Skip redundant CatArrayBatchedCopy in GLM-5 NSA TileLang decode
sglang.author: Jacob0226
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In GLM-5 NSA TileLang decode on ROCm, the fused-rope path dispatches a redundant CatArrayBatchedCopy<OpaqueType<1u>, ...> kernel once per layer per decode step that rebuilds an already-existing tensor.
The cause: fused_qk_rope_cat_and_cache_mla produces a contiguous q_cat of shape (M, num

sglang.title: [AMD] Run jit kernel PR test through run_suite.py register mechanism

The AMD jit-kernel-unit-test-amd PR job currently uses a hardcoded pytest invocation on a single test file (test_store_cache.py), bypassing the run_suite.py registration mechanism that all other AMD/CUDA CI jobs use. This makes it inconsistent with NVIDIA's equivalent job (stage-b-kernel-

sglang.title: [Disagg][NIXL] Add staging buffer support for heterogeneous TP KV transfer
sglang.author: YAMY1234
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
NIXL disaggregated serving currently requires prefill and decode to use the same TP layout. When prefill uses TP4 and decode uses DEP4 (DP4+TP4+EP4), each prefill rank's KV cache must be split and sent to multiple decode ranks. Without staging buffers, the prefill side must issue prefill_

We attempted to enable EP-MoE on BF16 models and found that BF16 data type was not supported in the DeepGEMM backend. This PR implements BF16 EP-MoE support using DeepGEMM's grouped BF16 GEMM kernels.
Modifications
Following the same computational paradigm as FP8, we have implemented EP-M

sglang.title: Fix scheduler admission for near-full KV requests
sglang.author: ziang663
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
A near-full KV request can be accepted into the waiting queue but later fail prefill admission forever.
The original init_req_max_new_tokens() clamps max_new_tokens only by max_req_len - input_len - 1. However, prefill admission uses a stricter KV budget that includes page alignment and o

Data-driven matrix partition counts from CIRegistry est_time. Replaces 14 hardcoded partition: [...] arrays + the Set max-parallel bash step with a single partitions JSON output keyed by suite name.
Formula (scripts/ci/utils/compute_partitions.py):

size = ceil(sum(est_time) * 1.15 / 20min) — per-pa

Two .github/actions/* files used overly-specific boundaries when matching j.name from listJobsForWorkflowRun. j.name is rendered by GHA in two forms:

inline + matrix: <job-key> (<shard>)

vllm.title: [Bugfix][SimpleCPUOffloadBackend] Dedup in-flight CPU offload stores across scheduler steps
vllm.author: ivanium
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
In eager mode, SimpleCPUOffloadScheduler deduplicated stores via a per-step local set plus cached_block_hash_to_block. The hash is only registered at store completion, so when req B hits the GPU prefix cache in step N+1 before req A's step-N store lands, the same GPU blocks get re-offloaded.

Promote bind_gpu_block_pool() from a SimpleCPUOffloadConnector-only method to a first-class API on KVConnectorBase_V1. This API is OPT-in and remains compatible with all existing connectors; it additionally allows any connector to access the GPU block pool for per-GPU-block status tracking (

vllm.title: [CI] Use uv with Python 3.12 for PyPI wheel upload

Fixes the "Upload release wheels to PyPI" step failing because the build agent uses system Python 3.9, which cannot install torch==2.11.0 (requires Python >= 3.10)
Replaces python3 -m venv + bare pip with uv venv --python 3.12 + uv pip install, ensuring a compatible Python version is always

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Default max_tokens server-side on /inference/v1/generate
vllm.author: hallerite
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
/inference/v1/generate hands the client-supplied SamplingParams to the engine verbatim. Because SamplingParams.max_tokens defaults to 16 at the dataclass level (vllm/sampling_params.py:231), any client that omits max_tokens silently gets a 16-token completion — long enough to start a sentenc

vllm.title: [ROCm] Run AITER RMSNorm pad fusion before AR RMS fusion
vllm.author: akii96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Reorder RocmAiterTritonAddRMSNormPadFusionPass to run before RocmAiterAllReduceFusionPass in pass_manager.py. Both passes match fused_add_rms_norm, but the pad-fusion pattern is a strict superset (fused_add_rms_norm → router GEMM → pad). Today AR+RMS fusion runs first and claims the shared n

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Skip ROCm batch invalid-input test pending torch fix

Skip test_completions_invalid_input only on ROCm while the base image has the old torch/Kineto exit behavior.

cc @kenroche

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix scipy audio resampling ratio
vllm.author: BWAAEEEK
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix resample_audio_scipy to compute the correct scipy.signal.resample_poly ratio when the original and target sample rates are not evenly divisible.
The previous implementation used floor division, so conversions like 44100 -> 16000 were treated as 1/2 instead of 160/441. This can produce incorrect

That is not true for target models that collect auxiliary hidden states for a
